[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000000011 3
1 0101100110 5
2 1010100000 3
3 1111010011 7
4 0111011110 7
5 1110010101 6
6 1001101101 6
7 0001000100 2

01 10 0000100000 1
12 21 1010000000 2
23 32 0111010010 5
34 43 0110010100 4
45 54 1000000101 3
56 65 0001000100 2 match 7
67 76 0000000000 a
70 07 0000000010 1

02 20 0101000010 3
13 31 0010000000 1
24 42 1110010001 5
35 53 0001001100 3
46 64 0000000100 1
57 75 1000000001 2
60 06 0001000100 2 match 7
71 17 1000000000 1

14 41 1010000000 2
25 52 1001000001 3
36 63 0001000100 2 match 7
47 74 1000000001 2
50 05 0001100100 3
61 16 0000000000 a
72 27 1000000011 3 match 0

37 73 0000000010 1
